The '''Tallaani Shipyards''', also known as '''Tallaan Imperial Shipyards''', were a number of [[Shipyard/Legends|shipyards]] in [[Orbit/Legends|orbit]] of [[Tallaan]] and spread throughout the [[Tallaan system/Legends|Tallaan system]]. The most important of these was located midpoint between Tallaan and its largest [[Moon/Legends|moon]]. The shipyards were made up of several hundred orbital docks, each able to service several dozen large [[Starship/Legends|ships]] or hundreds of smaller craft. Most of the docks themselves were over 200 [[Standard year/Legends|years]] old by the time of the [[Rebellion era]], and were continually being updated and revamped to keep them safe and up to current technological standards.<ref name="CRO" /> The [[Corellian Engineering Corporation Space Dock|typical dock]] was manufactured by the [[Corellian Engineering Corporation/Legends|Corellian Engineering Corporation]].<ref name="LotE">''[[Lords of the Expanse]]''</ref>

==History==
{{Quote|A long career in service to the citizens of the galaxy came to an abrupt end yesterday when Grand Moff Tarkin and several key aides died in a fiery shuttle crash while on final approach to the docking array at the Tallaan Imperial Shipyards. Tarkin had been returning from one of his periodic inspections of the Outer Rim fleets, and had been joined for the final leg of the trip by Admiral Motti, General Tagge and their staffs.|''[[New Order Progressive]]''|<ref name="GNN3">{{JournalCite|3|Galaxywide NewsNets}}</ref>}}
The Tallaani Shipyards were established around [[4000 BBY/Legends|4000 BBY]].<ref name="CRO" />

In the years following the [[Light and Darkness War]], the shipyards produced [[Envoy-class shuttle|''Envoy''-class shuttles]].<ref name="Rule of Two">''[[Darth Bane: Rule of Two]]''</ref>

By the time of the [[Rebellion era]] the yards had been an integral in the interstellar operations of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Republic]] for several hundred [[Standard year/Legends|years]]. The yards manufactured the [[Mansk-class escort frigate|''Mansk''-class light escort frigate]], [[Tapani-class assault frigate|''Tapani''-class assault frigate]] and the [[Tapani-class carrier|''Tapani''-class carrier]]. During this time they were defended by defense platforms manufactured by [[Golan Arms/Legends|Golan Arms]], and work was always underway on several [[Star Destroyer/Legends|Star Destroyers]] in the yards. The yards also refurbished [[Torpedo Sphere/Legends|Torpedo Spheres]]. In order to cover up [[Grand Moff/Legends|Grand Moff]] [[Wilhuff Tarkin/Legends|Wilhuff Tarkin]], [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Conan Antonio Motti/Legends|Conan Antonio Motti]], [[High General]] [[Cassio Tagge/Legends|Cassio Tagge]], [[Chief/Legends|Chief]] [[Siward Cass/Legends|Siward Cass]], [[High General]] [[Trech Molock/Legends|Trech Molock]], [[General/Legends|General]] [[Hurst Romodi/Legends|Hurst Romodi]], [[Chief/Legends|Chief]] [[Moradmin Bast/Legends|Moradmin Bast]], and [[Colonel/Legends|Colonel]] [[Wullf Yularen/Legends|Wullf Yularen's]] involvement in the [[DS-1 Orbital Battle Station/Legends|Death Star]] as well as their [[Death/Legends|death]] at [[Yavin 4/Legends|Yavin 4]], their deaths were reported on pro-[[New Order/Legends|New Order]] [[Propaganda/Legends|propaganda]] sources as being caused by a fiery crash during the final approach for a planned inspection of the Tallaan shipyards.

During the [[Yuuzhan Vong War|Yuuzhan Vong Invasion]], the Tallaan shipyards produced [[Star Destroyer/Legends|Star Destroyers]] for the [[Galactic Federation of Free Alliances]].<ref name="TUF">''[[The New Jedi Order: The Unifying Force]]''</ref> The shipyards were damaged during the war but remained operative.<ref name="DW" />

During the [[Second Galactic Civil War]], the Tallaani Shipyards went on to manufacture the new [[Bothan frigate]], which was used by the [[Confederation]] in their drive toward [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]].<ref name="Sacrifice" />
